title: orchis praetermissa subsp. integrata
intro: Orchis praetermissa subsp. integrata is a rare subspecies of Orchis praetermissa, a type of orchid found in Europe. This plant is also known as the Early Purple Orchid and is highly prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis praetermissa subsp. integrata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for centuries.
